title: WAI-ARIA Authoring Practices Guide
description: Official W3C guide with design patterns for common ARIA widgets, including keyboard interaction and focus management.

title: ARIA in HTML Specification
description: W3C specification defining which ARIA roles can be used on which HTML elements.

title: MDN ARIA Guide
description: Comprehensive MDN documentation on ARIA roles, states, and properties.

title: Accessible Name Computation
description: W3C guide to how accessible names are computed for elements.

title: axe DevTools
description: Browser extension that tests for ARIA and other accessibility violations.

title: ARIA Role Matrices
description: Complete list of ARIA 1.2 roles with required and supported states/properties.

title: A11y Support Data
description: Real-world ARIA and accessibility support data across browsers and screen readers.

title: Inclusive Components
description: Pattern library for accessible components with practical ARIA implementation.

title: WebAIM ARIA Survey
description: Screen reader user survey showing real-world ARIA support awareness and usage.

title: Lighthouse ARIA Audits
description: Chrome DevTools Lighthouse accessibility audits including ARIA-specific checks.
